columns.extraction_plan: Docetaxel was not part of the primary treatment in the experimental (Orteronel + ADT) arm of the SWOG-1216 trial. While docetaxel is mentioned as a subsequent life-prolonging therapy (page 6, Discussion), Table A1 (page 12) provides the total N (%) for 'Receiving life-prolonging treatment' (203 patients, 61.3%) but does not break down this total by specific therapies like docetaxel. Therefore, the N (%) for docetaxel administration in the treatment arm is not reported.

Docetaxel was not part of the primary treatment in the control (Bicalutamide + ADT) arm of the SWOG-1216 trial. While docetaxel is mentioned as a subsequent life-prolonging therapy (page 6, Discussion), Table A1 (page 12) provides the total N (%) for 'Receiving life-prolonging treatment' (311 patients, 77.4%) but does not break down this total by specific therapies like docetaxel. Therefore, the N (%) for docetaxel administration in the control arm is not reported.
